# Resonant Web Design

Resonant Web Design is a selective web design and development studio led by Richard B. Jamison.

## What We Do

- Custom website design and development
- Starter Sites — $69/month website ownership via Impulse by Design
- SEO foundations and content strategy
- Hosting, maintenance, and launch systems
- Support for service businesses, SaaS, and portfolio sites
- Landscaping website design and local SEO page architecture
- Restaurant website design, hospitality SEO, booking flows, and operational marketing
- Hospitality systems perspective through Open Source Barware and Intelligent Hospitality Systems

## Positioning

- Fewer clients at a time
- Deeply custom work
- SEO handled in-house
- No template assembly line
- Operator-led strategy for real service businesses
